app.name: Cursus
app.tagline: The tech internship journey, structured and validated.

auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and receive a reset link.
auth.cguLabel: I accept the terms and conditions
auth.checkEmail: If an account exists for this email, you will receive a link within the next few minutes.
auth.checkEmailDescription: A confirmation email has been sent. Click the link to activate your account.
auth.checkEmailSpam: If you don't see it, check your spam or junk mail folder.
auth.resetTokenExpired: This reset link has expired or is invalid.
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Your password has been updated. You will be redirected to the sign-in page.

errors.cguRequired: You must accept the terms and conditions to create an account
errors.emailAlreadyUsed: This email is already associated with an account.
errors.emailAlreadyUsedDetail: This email is already associated with an account. Sign in or reset your password.
errors.generic: An error occurred, please try again later.

errors.unauthorized: You don't have access to this resource.
